thought.text: 我将运行 Task2 基线并查看失败类型。

task_list.title: Inspect task2 parser framework and configuration
task_list.notes: ANTLR selected with revive ON; custom lexer reads task1 token stream. Current grammar supports only minimal int/add/return.

task_list.title: Run baseline task2 score
task_list.notes: Measure current pass rate and inspect representative AST diffs.

task_list.title: Implement parser/AST coverage for missing cases
task_list.notes: Patch ANTLR token mapping, grammar, and Ast2Asg for SysY constructs.

task_list.title: Verify task2 score and iterate
task_list.notes: Run task2-score repeatedly until full score or best within budget.

tool_call.name: task_tracker
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "plan", "task_list": [{"title": "Inspect task2 parser framework and configuration", "status": "done", "notes": "ANTLR selected with revive ON; custom lexer reads task1 token stream. Current grammar supports only minimal int/add/return."}, {"title": "Run baseline task2 score", "status": "in_progress", "notes": "Measure current pass rate and inspect representative AST diffs."}, {"title": "Implement parser/AST coverage for missing cases", "status": "todo", "notes": "Patch ANTLR token mapping, grammar, and Ast2Asg for SysY constructs."}, {"title": "Verify task2 score and iterate", "status": "todo", "notes": "Run task2-score repeatedly until full score or best within budget."}], "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Update task2 inspection progress"}
